scores.correctness_notes: Correctly shows event.relation.data[event.unit], iterating over event.relation.units, and accessing self.unit and event.app databags. All core patterns match the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issue: uses event.app for remote app databag, but the gold standard uses event.relation.app. event.app does exist on RelationChangedEvent but is subtly different — this is a minor inaccuracy rather than a fabrication.
